title: HAZARDOUS WASTE CONTROL LAW
doc_html:
CHAPTER 9.  HAZARDOUS WASTE CONTROL LAW

§2171.  Citation

This Chapter may be cited as the "Louisiana Hazardous Waste Control Law."

Acts 1979, No. 449, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1980.
